Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Divine Titans]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Divine Titans can be called while inside Subspace.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Doctor Janbell Cryce is the inventor of the Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce invented and built the Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Divine Titans are piloted by combatants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Divine Titans can convey Combat Arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — There are five Divine Titans in total.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Divine Titans are entities that can be summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Divine Titans are powerful entities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Divine Titans have a limited energy capacity.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Two Divine Titans emerged to support the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Red and green Divine Titans are fighting in the distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — The Divine Titans are kept in a hangar.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
